ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #6, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Dec-20-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ernest Der for and with Debra Dolch.

The Court stated that this is the 6th account and report with a request for fees and asked if counsel has anything to add regarding the fees requested. Mr. Der stated that the examiner's ask for time records, that this time it happens to be less than the guideline fee requested, cited 7.778 which talks about other factors such as loyalty and unusual expertise, that Ms. Dolch has these qualities, and gave an example of the time that Ms. Dolch was able to place Mr. Garcia in a hotel near BART when his brother was traveling and could not get Mr. Garcia to BART to go to work. The Court took the accounting petition under submission.

Judge: Paul Alvarado. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Chan. (Not Reported)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #3, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Nov-29-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ernest Der for Debra Dolch (Petitioner/Trustee).

Mr. Der stated that his Client has done everything she could to reduce costs, that she bills on an hourly basis, that he is not sure what else they could do and that he would be happy to do an accounting every two years. The Court granted the petition (subject to review of the order).

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: J. Chien.
